MODULE: cosmos.core.swarm_tools
FILE: cosmos/core/swarm_tools.py (108 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS SWARM TOOLS
==================

Native tools that empower the Swarm to modify the Cosmos codebase directly.
This fulfills the "Self-Modification" directive, allowing agents to write,
edit, and evolve their own source code.

"We are the architects of our own mind."

CLASSES:
- CosmosCodeEditor: Empowers the swarm to edit the live codebase natively.
Parses agent responses fo
  Methods: def apply_edits_from_response(self, response: str, author: str) -> list[dict]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_code_editor() -> CosmosCodeEditor
